fields.name: Insured Business Name
fields.description: The legal name of the business seeking insurance

fields.name: Applicant Name
fields.description: The name of the applicant for insurance

fields.name: Insured Address
fields.description: The physical or mailing address of the insured entity

fields.name: Agency
fields.description: The name of the insurance agency or brokerage

fields.name: Licensed producer
fields.description: The name of the licensed producer for the submission

fields.name: Segment
fields.description: The business segment of the risk

fields.name: Submission Type
fields.description: The type of submission (e.g., New, Renewal)

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.description: The date the policy becomes effective

fields.name: Business description
fields.description: A description of the insured's business activities

fields.name: Submission Description
fields.description: High-level description of what the submission encompasses

fields.name: Primary Rating State
fields.description: The primary state used for rating the risk

fields.name: IAT product
fields.description: The specific IAT product or program for this risk

fields.name: UW/ AM
fields.description: The assigned Underwriter or Account Manager

fields.name: NAICS Code
fields.description: North American Industry Classification System code

fields.name: SIC Code
fields.description: Standard Industrial Classification code

fields.name: Primary Phone
fields.description: Primary contact phone number

fields.name: Email Address
fields.description: Primary contact email address

fields.name: Entity Type
fields.description: The legal entity type (e.g., Corp, LLC, Individual)

fields.name: Agent Info
fields.description: Nested object with agencyName, name, email, phone

fields.name: Coverages
fields.description: An array of objects: { coverage, coverageDescription, limit, deductible }

fields.name: Exposures
fields.description: An array of objects: { exposureType, exposureDescription, value }
